name: Cursor
tagline: AI-native code editor
description: VS Code fork with deep AI editing, multi-file context, and a powerful agent mode. The most popular AI editor by mindshare.

name: GitHub Copilot
tagline: AI pair programmer from GitHub
description: Inline code completions and chat across IDEs. Deeply integrated with GitHub and VS Code. Used by millions of developers.

name: Windsurf
tagline: Agentic AI editor by Codeium
description: AI-native editor with Cascade agentic editing and Flows. Strong multi-file context and deep codebase understanding.

name: Zed
tagline: High-performance editor with native AI
description: Built in Rust for speed. Native AI with inline edit and a growing ecosystem. OSS with strong community momentum.

name: Continue
tagline: OSS VS Code plugin — bring your own LLM
description: Open-source VS Code and JetBrains extension. Connect any LLM via ollama, LiteLLM, or cloud APIs. Fully customizable.

name: Aider
tagline: CLI pair programmer with git integration
description: Terminal-based AI pair programmer that edits files through git. Supports 100+ models. Great for structured, commit-level changes.

name: Claude Code
tagline: Anthropic's official CLI coding agent
description: Terminal-first agentic coding assistant from Anthropic. Full MCP client support, codebase-aware, runs multi-step tasks autonomously.

name: Tabnine
tagline: AI completions trained on your private codebase
description: Enterprise-grade AI code completion trained on your organization's private codebase. Runs locally or in the cloud with strict data privacy guarantees.

name: Supermaven
tagline: Ultra-fast completions with 1M token context
description: The fastest AI code completion with a 1M token context window. Built by the creator of Tabnine for speed-first developer experience.

name: Plandex
tagline: Terminal AI coding engine for large multi-step tasks
description: AI coding engine designed for large, complex tasks that span many files. Uses a reliable plan-then-execute approach to avoid getting stuck.

name: Goose
tagline: Local, extensible CLI agent by Block
description: Open-source local AI agent from Block (Square). Extensible via plugins, runs entirely local, full MCP client support.

name: Aide
tagline: VS Code fork with deeply agentic, proactive coding
description: VS Code fork from Codestory with a proactive AI agent that notices issues without being asked. Designed for deep autonomous coding assistance.

name: Replit Ghostwriter
tagline: AI coding assistant built into Replit IDE
description: AI code completion, chat, and generation inside Replit's browser-based IDE. Ghostwriter can explain code, debug, and generate full programs with zero setup.

name: JetBrains AI Assistant
tagline: AI coding assistant native to JetBrains IDEs
description: AI completion, chat, and code generation built into all JetBrains IDEs. Understands project context deeply through IDE integration and code analysis.

name: Cline
tagline: Autonomous AI coding agent in VS Code
description: VS Code extension that gives Claude and other LLMs full agentic control — file edits, terminal commands, browser automation, and MCP tool use.

name: Bolt.new
tagline: StackBlitz AI full-stack web app builder
description: AI-powered in-browser development environment by StackBlitz. Generates, runs, and deploys full-stack web apps from prompts with real npm and Node.js.

name: Devin
tagline: Fully autonomous AI software engineer
description: Cognition's AI that handles complete dev tasks end-to-end: plans, codes, tests, debugs, and opens PRs without human input.

name: OpenHands
tagline: OSS platform for AI software dev agents
description: Open-source sandboxed platform for running AI software engineering agents. Supports multiple agent frameworks and LLMs.

name: SWE-agent
tagline: Research agent that solves GitHub issues
description: Princeton research agent that autonomously resolves real GitHub issues. Pioneered the SWE-bench benchmark category.

name: CrewAI
tagline: Role-based multi-agent orchestration
description: Framework for building multi-agent systems where each agent has a defined role, backstory, and tools. Simple and pythonic.

name: AutoGen
tagline: Conversational multi-agent framework by Microsoft
description: Microsoft's framework for building multi-agent systems through conversational patterns. Supports group chats, code execution, and tool use.

name: LangGraph
tagline: Graph-based stateful agent orchestration
description: Build stateful multi-actor applications as directed graphs. Part of the LangChain ecosystem. Strong for complex agentic workflows.

name: MetaGPT
tagline: Multi-agent software company simulation
description: Assigns GPT roles (PM, architect, engineer) to simulate a software company. Generates full project artifacts from one-line requirements.

name: Semantic Kernel
tagline: Microsoft SDK for AI orchestration
description: Microsoft's open-source SDK for integrating AI models into .NET, Python, and Java applications. Enterprise-grade orchestration with plugin architecture.

name: Lovable
tagline: AI that builds full-stack web apps from prompts
description: Lovable generates complete full-stack web applications from natural language. It handles frontend, backend, auth, and database — editable in real time.

name: GPT Pilot
tagline: AI dev that codes entire apps step by step
description: OSS AI developer that scaffolds and builds entire applications while asking clarifying questions at each step. Designed for complex, multi-file projects.

name: v0
tagline: Prompt → production React/Tailwind components
description: Vercel's AI that generates production-ready React and Tailwind UI from prompts. Exports directly to code. Legitimized AI design-to-code.

name: Galileo AI
tagline: Text → Figma-ready UI generation
description: Generates complete Figma-ready UI designs from text prompts. Targets design teams looking to accelerate early-stage UI generation.

name: Locofy.ai
tagline: Figma/XD → production React/Next.js code
description: Converts Figma and Adobe XD designs into production-ready React, Next.js, and React Native code with accurate styling.

name: Builder.io
tagline: Visual CMS + AI design-to-code from Figma
description: AI-powered visual editor that converts Figma designs to clean React code and offers a headless CMS for visual content editing.

name: Framer AI
tagline: AI-generated websites from prompts
description: Generate complete, publishable websites from a text prompt directly inside Framer. Editable, responsive, and instantly live.

name: Uizard
tagline: Wireframes from sketches and text prompts
description: Converts rough sketches, screenshots, or text descriptions into interactive UI wireframes. Fast prototyping without design expertise.

name: Relume
tagline: AI sitemap and wireframe generation
description: Generates complete site architectures and wireframes from a brief. Outputs to Figma and Webflow, accelerating the design planning phase.

name: Webflow AI
tagline: AI site builder and copy generation in Webflow
description: AI-powered site generation, layout suggestions, and copy writing built into Webflow. Generate fully editable, responsive websites without writing code.

name: Anima
tagline: Figma → React/Vue/HTML code generation
description: Converts Figma designs to production-ready React, Vue, and HTML code. Supports design tokens, responsive layouts, and interactive components.

name: Kombai
tagline: Figma-to-code AI with semantic understanding
description: AI that converts Figma designs to clean, maintainable code by understanding design semantics rather than just copying layout pixels.

name: LangChain
tagline: The leading LLM app framework
description: Most widely used framework for building LLM applications. Chains, agents, RAG pipelines, and deep integrations with 300+ tools.

name: LlamaIndex
tagline: Data framework for RAG and LLM pipelines
description: Framework specialized in data ingestion, indexing, and retrieval for LLM applications. The go-to for complex RAG pipelines.

name: DSPy
tagline: Programming (not prompting) LLMs
description: Stanford's framework for algorithmically optimizing LLM pipelines. Replaces hand-crafted prompts with declarative modules and automatic optimization.

name: Flowise
tagline: No-code visual LangChain pipeline builder
description: Open-source drag-and-drop UI for building LangChain pipelines without code. Makes AI orchestration accessible to non-engineers.

name: Dify
tagline: OSS LLM app development platform
description: Open-source platform with a visual workflow builder, model management, RAG pipeline, and agent capabilities in one product.

name: n8n
tagline: Workflow automation with AI nodes
description: Fair-code workflow automation with 400+ integrations and native AI nodes. Self-hostable and increasingly used for AI pipelines.

name: Haystack
tagline: Composable NLP and LLM pipeline framework
description: deepset's open-source framework for building production NLP and LLM pipelines. Strong focus on RAG, search, and document AI use cases.

name: Langflow
tagline: Visual builder for LangChain pipelines
description: Open-source drag-and-drop interface for building LangChain pipelines. Backed by DataStax, it's the closest competitor to Flowise.

name: Mastra
tagline: TypeScript AI agent framework by Vercel contributors
description: TypeScript-first framework for building AI agents and workflows. Supports tool use, memory, RAG, and evals with first-class Vercel AI SDK integration.

name: PydanticAI
tagline: Type-safe Python agent framework by Pydantic team
description: Agent framework from the Pydantic team leveraging Python's type system. Supports structured outputs, dependency injection, and multi-model backends.

name: smolagents
tagline: HuggingFace's minimal agent framework
description: Lightweight agent framework from HuggingFace. Agents write Python code as actions rather than JSON, enabling complex multi-step reasoning with minimal overhead.

name: Agno
tagline: Fast Python agent framework, formerly Phidata
description: High-performance Python framework for building multi-modal AI agents with memory, knowledge, and tool use. Formerly known as Phidata.

name: Sweep AI
tagline: GitHub bot: issues → PRs automatically
description: GitHub bot that converts issues and bug reports into working pull requests. Handles simple to medium complexity tasks autonomously.

name: CodeRabbit
tagline: AI code review bot for GitHub/GitLab
description: Automated AI code review that provides line-by-line feedback on PRs. Understands context, suggests improvements, and catches bugs.

name: Qodo (CodiumAI)
tagline: AI test generation and code integrity
description: Generates meaningful tests and reviews code behavior on PRs. Focuses on code correctness rather than just style.

name: Graphite
tagline: AI-assisted PR stacking and code review
description: Stacked diffs workflow with AI-powered code review. Speeds up PR review cycles for teams that ship frequently.

name: Sourcery
tagline: AI refactoring and code review in CI
description: AI-powered code review that runs in CI pipelines and IDE. Focuses on refactoring suggestions, code quality improvements, and PR feedback.

name: Grit.io
tagline: AI-powered code migrations and upgrades at scale
description: Automates large-scale code migrations — upgrading frameworks, removing deprecated APIs, and enforcing patterns across entire codebases.

name: Pixee
tagline: Automated security hardening PRs
description: Automatically opens PRs that fix security vulnerabilities found by SAST tools. Converts SAST findings into actionable, reviewed code changes.

name: Trunk
tagline: Code quality, linting, and merge queue CI
description: Developer platform combining AI-assisted code checking, a merge queue for safe parallel merging, and flaky test management. Works with any CI system.

name: Codegen
tagline: AI-powered automated code migrations
description: AI agent that performs large-scale automated code migrations across codebases. Handles framework upgrades, API changes, and refactors with review workflows.

name: Mintlify
tagline: Auto-generates and hosts docs from code
description: AI-powered documentation platform that generates and maintains docs from your codebase. Beautiful hosted output with AI search.

name: Swimm
tagline: AI-powered internal code docs synced to codebase
description: Creates living internal documentation that stays in sync with code changes. Great for onboarding and reducing knowledge silos.

name: Notion AI
tagline: AI writing assistant within Notion
description: AI writing, summarization, and Q&A built into Notion. Used for docs, PRDs, meeting notes, and knowledge bases.

name: GitBook AI
tagline: AI-powered search and content generation in GitBook
description: Semantic search and AI Q&A built into GitBook documentation. Readers can ask questions and get AI-generated answers grounded in your docs.

name: Linear AI
tagline: AI issue writing, triage, and summarization
description: AI features built into Linear for writing better issues, triaging bugs, and summarizing project activity. Bundled with Linear.

name: Height AI
tagline: AI task management with autonomous project ops
description: Project management tool with an AI agent that can autonomously triage tasks, draft specs, and manage backlog — without being explicitly asked.

name: Cycle
tagline: AI-powered product discovery and feedback synthesis
description: Connects user feedback to product decisions. AI synthesizes patterns from interviews, support tickets, and surveys into actionable insights.

name: Kraftful
tagline: AI analysis of user feedback and feature requests
description: Synthesizes user feedback from interviews, reviews, and support tickets into structured product insights. Replaces manual qualitative analysis.

name: LiteLLM
tagline: Universal LLM proxy — 100+ models, one API
description: OSS proxy that normalizes 100+ LLMs to the OpenAI format. Add routing, fallbacks, caching, and cost tracking in one layer.

name: OpenRouter
tagline: Unified API routing to 200+ LLMs
description: Routes requests to 200+ LLMs through one API. Handles fallbacks, cost optimization, and model discovery. Pay per token.

name: PortKey
tagline: AI gateway with routing, fallbacks, and caching
description: Production AI gateway with smart routing, automatic fallbacks, semantic caching, and full observability. Drop-in replacement for direct LLM calls.

name: LangSmith
tagline: LLM tracing, evaluation, and dataset management
description: LangChain's observability platform. Trace every LLM call, run evals on datasets, and manage prompts in production.

name: Langfuse
tagline: OSS LLM engineering platform
description: Open-source platform for tracing, evaluations, and prompt management. Self-hostable alternative to LangSmith with clean UX.

name: Helicone
tagline: LLM observability, cost tracking, request logging
description: Open-source LLM observability platform. One-line integration to log every LLM request, track costs, and debug slow or failing calls.

name: Arize Phoenix
tagline: ML/LLM observability and evaluation platform
description: Open-source observability platform for ML and LLM applications. Supports tracing, evaluation, and dataset management with a strong eval framework.

name: Braintrust
tagline: AI evaluation platform with datasets and prompt mgmt
description: End-to-end evaluation platform for AI products. Manage datasets, run evals, and track prompt versions across experiments in a clean interface.

name: Ollama
tagline: Run LLMs locally via simple CLI/API
description: Dead-simple local LLM serving. Pull and run models like Docker images. Compatible with the OpenAI API format.

name: vLLM
tagline: High-throughput LLM serving with PagedAttention
description: Production-grade LLM inference server. PagedAttention enables high throughput and efficient KV cache memory management.

name: Groq
tagline: Ultra-fast LLM inference via LPU hardware
description: Inference API powered by custom Language Processing Units. 10x faster than GPU-based inference for supported models.

name: Together AI
tagline: Fast inference API for open-source models
description: Inference API with 200+ open-source models at competitive speeds. Popular for running Llama, Mistral, and other open models at scale.

name: Fireworks AI
tagline: Fast inference with function calling and fine-tuning
description: High-performance inference API with native function calling, structured outputs, and fine-tuning for open-source models.

name: llama.cpp
tagline: C++ LLM inference for local and edge deployment
description: Highly optimized C++ inference engine for running quantized LLMs on CPU and GPU. The foundation for Ollama and many local AI tools.

name: Modal
tagline: Cloud platform for GPU inference and training
description: Run Python functions on serverless GPUs with zero infrastructure management. Popular for deploying custom LLM inference and fine-tuning jobs.

name: Qdrant
tagline: High-performance vector DB with filtering
description: Rust-based vector database optimized for filtering. Supports named vectors, payloads, and hybrid search. Self-hostable or cloud.

name: Chroma
tagline: Lightweight embedded vector DB for AI apps
description: Developer-friendly vector database. Embeds in-process or runs as a server. Great for prototyping RAG applications quickly.

name: pgvector
tagline: PostgreSQL extension for vector similarity search
description: Adds vector similarity search to PostgreSQL. Perfect for teams already on Postgres who don't want to manage a separate vector DB.

name: Pinecone
tagline: Managed vector DB service
description: Fully managed vector database with serverless indexes. No ops overhead. The go-to managed option for production RAG.

name: Weaviate
tagline: Cloud-native vector search engine
description: Open-source vector database with hybrid search (vector + BM25), multi-modal support, and native GraphQL API. Strong enterprise adoption.

name: Milvus
tagline: Distributed vector database built for scale
description: Cloud-native vector database designed for billion-scale similarity search. Powers Zilliz Cloud and used by major enterprises for production RAG.

name: Anthropic API
tagline: Claude models API by Anthropic
description: API access to Claude model family including Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Haiku, and Opus. Excels at coding, analysis, long-context tasks, and safety-critical applications.

name: OpenAI API
tagline: GPT-4o, o1, and embeddings from OpenAI
description: API access to GPT-4o, o1, and other OpenAI models including embeddings and image generation. The most widely used LLM API in production.

name: Mistral API
tagline: Mistral and Mixtral models via La Plateforme
description: API access to Mistral's efficient models including Mistral Large, Mixtral 8x7B, and the ultra-fast Mistral Small. Strong multilingual support.

name: Cohere API
tagline: Command and Embed models for enterprise NLP
description: API for Cohere's Command (generation) and Embed (embeddings) models. Strong focus on enterprise search, RAG, and classification use cases.

name: Replicate
tagline: Run open-source ML models via API
description: Cloud platform for running thousands of open-source ML models via a simple API. Supports LLMs, image generation, audio, and video models.

name: HuggingFace
tagline: Open ML model hub and inference platform
description: The central hub for open-source ML models, datasets, and spaces. Offers Inference API, Inference Endpoints, and the Transformers library for running models.

name: Vercel AI SDK
tagline: TypeScript SDK for streaming AI UIs
description: Open-source SDK for building AI-powered streaming UIs in Next.js and Node.js. Unified provider API supports OpenAI, Anthropic, and 20+ others.

name: Ray
tagline: Distributed computing framework for ML workloads
description: Open-source distributed computing framework for scaling Python ML workloads. Ray Serve and Ray Train power production LLM serving and fine-tuning pipelines.

name: Logfire
tagline: Observability platform by the Pydantic team
description: OpenTelemetry-based observability platform built by Pydantic. Tight integration with PydanticAI for tracing agent runs and LLM calls with structured data.

name: MCP SDK (TypeScript)
tagline: Official Anthropic SDK for MCP servers/clients
description: The official TypeScript SDK for building and connecting MCP servers and clients. The foundation for the MCP ecosystem.

name: MCP SDK (Python)
tagline: Official Anthropic Python SDK for MCP
description: The official Python SDK for building MCP servers and clients. Pairs with FastMCP for high-level abstractions and custom MCP server development.

name: FastMCP
tagline: High-level Python framework for MCP servers
description: Simplifies building MCP servers in Python with decorators and automatic schema generation. The FastAPI of the MCP world.

name: Smithery
tagline: MCP server registry and deployment platform
description: Discover, deploy, and manage MCP servers. Registry of 2,000+ community MCP servers with one-click deployment.

name: E2B
tagline: Sandboxed code execution for AI agents
description: Provides secure, isolated sandboxes for AI agents to run code. Popular MCP target for agentic coding workflows.

name: Context7
tagline: Up-to-date library docs via MCP
description: MCP server that provides AI coding assistants with accurate, version-specific library documentation. Eliminates hallucinated API calls by grounding LLMs in real docs.

name: Playwright MCP
tagline: Browser automation via MCP for AI agents
description: Official Microsoft MCP server that gives AI agents full browser automation via Playwright. Enables web scraping, testing, and interaction tasks from any MCP client.

name: GitHub MCP
tagline: GitHub operations via MCP for AI agents
description: Official GitHub MCP server exposing repos, PRs, issues, and code search to AI agents. Enables agentic workflows that read and write to GitHub.

name: PromptFoo
tagline: CLI/library for prompt testing and red-teaming
description: Test and compare prompts across models. Built-in red-teaming, regression testing, and side-by-side model comparison.

name: DeepEval
tagline: LLM evaluation framework — 14+ metrics
description: Open-source evaluation framework with 14+ metrics including faithfulness, relevancy, and hallucination detection. Integrates with CI/CD.

name: RAGAS
tagline: RAG pipeline evaluation framework
description: Evaluates retrieval-augmented generation pipelines on faithfulness, answer relevancy, context precision, and recall.

name: Vellum
tagline: Prompt engineering, testing, and deployment platform
description: End-to-end platform for prompt engineering teams. Version prompts, run A/B tests, evaluate quality, and deploy to production with a visual interface.

name: PromptLayer
tagline: Prompt versioning, logging, and A/B testing
description: Log every LLM request, version prompts, and run A/B tests. Provides a visual interface for prompt engineering teams to iterate collaboratively.

name: Agenta
tagline: OSS prompt management and LLM eval platform
description: Open-source platform combining prompt management, human evaluation, and automated testing. Self-hostable alternative to commercial eval platforms.

name: Weights & Biases
tagline: ML experiment tracking and LLM evaluation
description: Industry-standard ML experiment tracking platform with LLM-specific tools for prompt evaluation, fine-tuning monitoring, and dataset versioning.

name: Traceloop
tagline: OpenTelemetry-based LLM observability
description: Open-source LLM observability using OpenTelemetry standards. Automatic instrumentation for LangChain, OpenAI, and other frameworks with zero code changes.

name: Spec Kit
tagline: GitHub's OSS toolkit for spec-driven AI coding workflows
description: Open-source scaffold from GitHub that operationalizes spec-driven development with AI coding agents. Creates structured .specify/ folders that serve as the source of truth for Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, and Gemini CLI — steering AI generation from upfront specs rather than improvised prompts.

name: Mermaid
tagline: Text-to-diagram natively supported by GitHub and Notion
description: Renders flowcharts, sequence diagrams, ER diagrams, C4 diagrams, and Gantt charts from simple Markdown-style text definitions. Native support in GitHub, GitLab, Notion, and dozens of engineering platforms. With 87k+ GitHub stars, it's the most widely adopted diagramming tool in engineering.

name: Eraser
tagline: AI co-pilot for technical diagrams synced to your codebase
description: Generate architecture diagrams, ERDs, cloud infrastructure diagrams, and sequence diagrams from natural language or code via DiagramGPT. Supports GitHub sync and a VS Code extension so diagrams stay connected to code. SOC II Type 2 compliant and never trains on user data.

name: Structurizr
tagline: Code-first C4 model architecture diagrams as structured text
description: Implements the C4 model as a diagrams-as-code DSL — write Structurizr DSL and render multiple architecture views (Context, Container, Component, Code) from a single model. Version-controlled alongside code with full ADR integration. Free OSS CLI plus paid cloud workspace for team collaboration.

name: Swagger / OpenAPI
tagline: The foundational OpenAPI toolchain for API design and docs
description: Swagger UI is the canonical open-source renderer for interactive API documentation from OpenAPI specs, with 28k+ GitHub stars. SwaggerHub adds collaborative API design, versioning, and governance at scale. The de facto standard for REST API specification across the industry.

name: Redocly
tagline: OpenAPI linting, bundling, and beautiful API docs from one CLI
description: Combines Redoc (25k+ GitHub stars) with a powerful CLI for linting, validating, and bundling OpenAPI specs. Supports OpenAPI 3.x, Swagger 2.0, AsyncAPI, and Arazzo. Enterprise offering adds developer portals and auto-generated code samples across teams.

name: AsyncAPI
tagline: Open standard for defining event-driven async APIs
description: The specification standard for async, event-driven APIs over Kafka, MQTT, WebSockets, and more — the async equivalent of OpenAPI. The ecosystem includes CLI, parser, code generators, and server stub templates. Widely adopted in microservices and streaming architectures.

name: Stoplight
tagline: Visual API design platform with linting, mocking, and docs built in
description: Design-first platform for creating, governing, and documenting OpenAPI specifications. Bundles a visual editor, Spectral (JSON/YAML linter), Prism (mock server), and Elements (docs renderer) into one workflow. Teams use it to enforce API style guides across large API portfolios.

name: Speakeasy
tagline: OpenAPI → idiomatic SDKs, MCP servers, and contract tests
description: Takes an OpenAPI spec and generates polished, type-safe client SDKs across multiple languages, Terraform providers, and MCP servers for AI agent integration. Handles pagination, retries, webhooks, and streaming out of the box. Increasingly positioning itself as the API platform for the agent era.

name: Fern
tagline: OpenAPI in, idiomatic SDKs and API docs out
description: Takes an OpenAPI spec and generates hand-crafted-quality SDKs across TypeScript, Python, Go, Java, Ruby, C#, and PHP, plus integrated documentation sites. SDKs and docs stay in sync from a single source of truth. Used by Cohere, ElevenLabs, and Merge.

name: Stainless
tagline: Generates hand-crafted SDKs trusted by OpenAI and Anthropic
description: Accepts an OpenAPI spec and produces high-quality, idiomatic SDKs that feel hand-written across TypeScript, Python, Go, Java, Kotlin, Ruby, PHP, and C#. GitHub integration auto-regenerates SDKs when the spec changes. The team behind OpenAI, Anthropic, Cloudflare, and Meta's official SDKs.

name: OpenAPI Generator
tagline: Community-driven code generation for 50+ languages from OpenAPI
description: The most widely adopted open-source code generator forked from Swagger Codegen. Given an OpenAPI spec, generates API client SDKs, server stubs, and documentation for 50+ languages and frameworks. 26k+ GitHub stars, 600k weekly NPM downloads, and 30M Docker pulls.
